title: Ars Elemancy
description: An extension of Ars Elemental, adding dual - and quad- elemental armors and foci.
body:
This extension for Ars Elemental adds the Cindermancer, Lavamancer, Miremancer, Siltmancer, Tempestmancer, and Vapormancer dual-element armors and foci, as well as the Elemancer set which combines the power of all 4 elements.

Take your Ars Elemental powers to the next level by mastering multiple elements at once.  Utilize the new dual-element armor sets and foci to broaden your spellcasting prowess to multiple schools, or the ultimate Elemancer armor that gives you power over all four elements.



This mod requires both Ars Nouveau and the Ars Elemental addon.

v1.12 -

adds light and heavy variants for all element combos

Known Issues:

animations are not working on quad-element armors
inventory icons for quad element gear not updated
